title: OH NO MY CAR
description: Add baity references, and strong cows!
body:
**STRANGE CARS ARE APPEARING ALL OVER THE MINECRAFT WORLD? WHO LEFT THESE CARS AND WHY DO I SUDDENLY FEEL THE NEED TO USE THE BATHROOM?**
////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
![Cowicon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2cf9ce20a18134f17304c10b16c027c6024a215.png)
////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
![cowbig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68ebdfd3e5a301e48d93d0ba49d05d0a82342c34.jpeg)
-This mod adds 2 new enemies, also a quest about cars.
-One cow, one angry guy, one car, and one helmet.
feature: you find a car and then an angry guy will attack you with his cows.(boss fight)

> DEPENDENCY: GekoLib
